---
title: "ConditionIndex"
output: html_document
---

# Perform basic analyses, output figures and tables for ConditionIndex data

``` {r BasicStats}

### Stats for ConditionIndex rates
# ConditionIndex by section
ConditionIndexStats <- ConditionIndex %>%
  mutate(Month = month(TripDate),
         Year = year(TripDate),
         CI = ((TissueDryWeight - TarePanWeight) * 100) / (TotalWeight - ShellWetWeight)) %>%
  filter(Year <= ReportYear) %>%
  filter(CI > 0) %>%
  filter(!is.na(CI))

```

```{r Model selection OIMMP}
#########
# Figure out which data distribution to use
# All years
hist(ConditionIndexStats$CI)
# OIMMP
 # Attempted to use Section, Year,ShellVolume, ShellLinear, ShellHeight, and TotalWeight. Month outperformed by over 3000
# Adding FixedLocationID as random effect help (over 300) but adding section as nested random effect didn't
# tried using gaussian distribution, actually worse fit
# tried different Dispersion parameters, none or FixedLocation. Month outperformed all. improving the dispersion test and AIC
# tried to include Year month interaction, but that didn't converge appears that the seasonal trend persists from year to year, though there is some variation 

ConditionIndex <- glmmTMB( #### Best by 200
  CI ~ factor(Month) + factor(Year) + (1 | FixedLocationID),
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
  dispformula = ~ factor(Month),
  data = ConditionIndexStats)

# ### Use AICc to compare the models: we'll use the model with the lowest score for making any inferences moving forward
# oimmp_models <- list(
#   '8-Month&Location' = oimmp_CI.month.location,
#   '12-Disp.1' = oimmp_CI.month.location.disp1,
#   '13-Disp.Month' = oimmp_CI.month.location.dispmonth,
#   '14-Disp.Location' = oimmp_CI.month.location.displocation)
# 
# aictab(oimmp_models) #will use one for analysis

simulationOutput <- simulateResiduals(ConditionIndex, n = 1000, refit = FALSE, plot = TRUE)

acf(residuals(ConditionIndex, type = "pearson"))

summary(ConditionIndex)

# Diagnostic Table for the Appendix
diag_oimmp_CI <- extract_diagnostics(ConditionIndex,  "Condition Index")
# This needs some work
# “Because variance partitioning metrics (marginal and conditional R2) are not uniquely defined for Gamma generalized linear mixed models with modeled dispersion, model fit was assessed using likelihood-based criteria and simulation-based diagnostics. DHARMa residual simulations indicated no evidence of over- or under-dispersion (dispersion ratio = 0.98, p = 0.76) and no systematic residual patterns.”


```


``` {r Data extraction}
# Predict standardized monthly mean condition index
# Rate units are dimensionless

#1. Predicted Means + 95% CI for All Months
# Make sure Month, are factors
emm_month <- emmeans(
  ConditionIndex,
  specs = ~ Month,
  type = "response") %>%
  as.data.frame(emm_month) %>%
  rename(ConditionIndexMean_modeled = response,
         ConditionIndexLower_modeled = asymp.LCL,
         ConditionIndexUpper_modeled = asymp.UCL) %>%
  select(-SE, -df)


#2. Predicted Means + 95% CI for All Years
# Make sure Month, are factors
emm_year <- emmeans(
  ConditionIndex,
  specs = ~ Year,
  type = "response") %>%
  as.data.frame(emm_year) %>%
  rename(ConditionIndexMean_modeled = response,
         ConditionIndexLower_modeled = asymp.LCL,
         ConditionIndexUpper_modeled = asymp.UCL) %>%
  select(-SE, -df) 

############# Raw means and SD
# Months
CI_Month_Raw <- ConditionIndexStats %>%
  group_by(Month) %>%
  summarise(CIMean_Raw = mean(CI, na.rm = TRUE),
            CISD_Raw = sd(CI, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

# Years
CI_Year_Raw <- ConditionIndexStats %>%
  group_by(Year) %>%
  summarise(CIMean_Raw = mean(CI, na.rm = TRUE),
            CISD_Raw = sd(CI, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

# Summary Table for Appendix
ConditionIndexMonth_TABLE <- left_join(CI_Month_Raw, emm_month, by = c("Month"))
kable(ConditionIndexMonth_TABLE,
      digits = 1,
      col.names = c("Month", 
      "Raw Mean Condition Index", "Raw SD",
      "Modeled Mean Condition Index", "LCL 95%", "UCL 95%"),
      caption = "Raw and Modeled Mean Condition Index by Month. Condition Index is a dimensionless value. SD = Standard Deviation. LCL = Lower Confidence Limit. UCL = Upper Confidence Limit. ")

ConditionIndexYear_TABLE <- left_join(CI_Year_Raw, emm_year, by = c("Year"))
kable(ConditionIndexYear_TABLE,
      digits = 1,
      col.names = c("Year", 
      "Raw Mean Condition Index", "Raw SD",
      "Modeled Mean Condition Index", "LCL 95%", "UCL 95%"),
      caption = "Raw and Modeled Mean Condition Index by Year Condition Index is a dimensionless value. SD = Standard Deviation. LCL = Lower Confidence Limit. UCL = Upper Confidence Limit. ")

```



``` {r ConditionIndex Figures}
# Month
# ggplot Skeleton
ConditionIndexMonth_FIGURE <-
ggplot() +
  # 1. Line
  geom_line(
    data = emm_month,
    aes(
      x = Month,
      y = ConditionIndexMean_modeled
    ),
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  # 2. mean as a symbol
    geom_point(
    data = emm_month,
    aes(
      x = Month,
      y = ConditionIndexMean_modeled
    ),
    shape = 1,        # open circle
    size = 3,
    stroke = 1
  ) +
  # 4. 95% CI
  geom_errorbar(
    data = emm_month,
    aes(
      x = Month,
      ymin = ConditionIndexLower_modeled,
      ymax = ConditionIndexUpper_modeled
    ),
    width = 0.2,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  # Scale
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:12,
    labels = month.abb
  ) +
  # labels
  labs(
    x = "Month",
    y = "Mean Condition Index",
    title = "Monthly Mean Condition Index"
  ) +

  theme_bw() 

print(ConditionIndexMonth_FIGURE)  
  
######
# Year
# ggplot Skeleton
ConditionIndexYear_FIGURE <-
ggplot() +
  # 1. Line
  geom_line(
    data = emm_year,
    aes(
      x = as.factor(Year),
      y = ConditionIndexMean_modeled,
      group = 1
    ),
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  # 2. mean as a symbol
    geom_point(
    data = emm_year,
    aes(
      x = as.factor(Year),
      y = ConditionIndexMean_modeled
    ),
    shape = 1,        # open circle
    size = 3,
    stroke = 1
  ) +
  # 4. 95% CI
  geom_errorbar(
    data = emm_year,
    aes(
      x = as.factor(Year),
      ymin = ConditionIndexLower_modeled,
      ymax = ConditionIndexUpper_modeled
    ),
    width = 0.2,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  # Scale
  scale_x_discrete() +

  # labels
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Mean Condition Index",
    title = "Yearly Mean Condition Index"
  ) +

  theme_bw() 

print(ConditionIndexYear_FIGURE) 

```

``` {ConditionIndex Text}
### Placeholder for ConditionIndex text for report
```
This is text to output for ConditionIndex


``` {r Model Selection Cahill, eval = FALSE}
# Extra items were considered, but rejuected. I'm saving them here, but the above code will be stripped of extraneous values.
### Stats for ConditionIndex rates
# ConditionIndex by section
ConditionIndexStats <- ConditionIndex %>%
  mutate(Month = month(TripDate),
         Year = year(TripDate),
         CI_cahill = ((TissueDryWeight - TarePanWeight) / ShellDryWeight) * 100,
         CI_oimmp = ((TissueDryWeight - TarePanWeight) * 100) / (TotalWeight - ShellWetWeight),
         ShellVolume = ShellHeight * ShellLength * ShellWidth,
         ShellLinear = ShellHeight + ShellLength + ShellWidth,
         ShellVolume_scaled = scale(ShellVolume)[,1],
         ShellLinear_scaled = scale(ShellLinear)[,1],
         ShellHeight_scaled = scale(ShellHeight)[,1],
         TotalWeight_scaled = scale(TotalWeight)[,1]) %>%
  filter(Year <= ReportYear)

CI_Cahill <- ConditionIndexStats %>%
  filter(!is.na(CI_cahill))

CI_oimmp <- ConditionIndexStats %>%
  filter(CI_oimmp > 0) %>%
  filter(!is.na(CI_oimmp))
# Cahill's values were considered, but were roughly the same to OIMMP. Going with OIMMP for consistency
# Figure out which data distribution to use
# Cahill
# All years
hist(CI_Cahill$CI_cahill)
# past years
hist(subset(CI_Cahill, TripDate <= ReportStart)$CI_cahill)
# current year
hist(subset(CI_Cahill, TripDate >= ReportStart)$CI_cahill) 
# try nBinom2 and gamma

# OIMMP
# All years
hist(CI_oimmp$CI_oimmp)
# past years
hist(subset(CI_oimmp, TripDate <= ReportStart)$CI_oimmp)
# current year
hist(subset(CI_oimmp, TripDate >= ReportStart)$CI_oimmp) 


# Cahill
Cahill_CI.section <- glmmTMB(
  CI_cahill ~ factor(SectionName),
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
  data = CI_Cahill)

Cahill_CI.year <- glmmTMB(
  CI_cahill ~ factor(Year),
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
  data = CI_Cahill)

Cahill_CI.month <- glmmTMB( #### Best by over 2000
  CI_cahill ~ factor(Month),
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
  data = CI_Cahill)

Cahill_CI.ShellVolume_scaled <- glmmTMB(
  CI_cahill ~ ShellVolume_scaled,
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
  data = CI_Cahill)

Cahill_CI.ShellLinear_scaled <- glmmTMB(
  CI_cahill ~ ShellLinear_scaled,
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
  data = CI_Cahill)

Cahill_CI.ShellHeight_scaled <- glmmTMB(
  CI_cahill ~ ShellHeight_scaled,
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
  data = CI_Cahill)

Cahill_CI.TotalWeight_scaled <- glmmTMB(
  CI_cahill ~ TotalWeight_scaled,
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
  data = CI_Cahill)

Cahill_CI.month.location <- glmmTMB( #### Best by over 300
  CI_cahill ~ factor(Month) + (1 | FixedLocationID),
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
  data = CI_Cahill)
         
### Use AICc to compare the models: we'll use the model with the lowest score for making any inferences moving forward
Cahill_models <- list(
  '1-Section' = Cahill_CI.section,
  '2-Year' = Cahill_CI.year, 
  '3-Month' = Cahill_CI.month, 
  '4-Volume' = Cahill_CI.ShellVolume_scaled, 
  '5-Linear' = Cahill_CI.ShellLinear_scaled,
  '6-ShellHeight' = Cahill_CI.ShellHeight_scaled,
  '7-TotalWeight' = Cahill_CI.TotalWeight_scaled,
  '8-Month&Location' = Cahill_CI.month.location,
  '9-bestfromother' = cahill_CI)

aictab(Cahill_models) #will use one for analysis

simulateResiduals(cahill_CI, n = 1000, refit = FALSE, plot = TRUE)

cahill_CI <- glmmTMB( #### Best by 200
  CI_cahill ~ factor(Month) + factor(Year) + (1 | FixedLocationID),
  family = Gamma(link = "log"),
  dispformula = ~ factor(Month),
  data = CI_Cahill)

summary(cahill_CI)


```
